findings.evidence: `rg` shows `theorem groupLikeSetSpan_toSubmodule` at line 60 with only `@[simp]` above it, no `/-- ... -/` docstring.
findings.fix: Add a docstring explaining that the underlying submodule is the linear span of the underlying elements of the group-like set.
findings.issue: `groupLikeSetSpan_toSubmodule` is a main public theorem identifying the carrier of `groupLikeSetSpan`, but it has no docstring.

findings.evidence: `rg` shows `theorem groupLikeSpan_toSubmodule` at line 110 with only `@[simp]` above it, no `/-- ... -/` docstring.
findings.fix: Add a docstring stating that the underlying submodule of `groupLikeSpan g` is the one-dimensional span `R ∙ (g : C)`.
findings.issue: `groupLikeSpan_toSubmodule` is the main public theorem identifying the singleton group-like subcoalgebra with `R ∙ g`, but it has no docstring.

summary: The module docstrings are present and mostly accurate, but two central public identification theorems in the group-like API are undocumented.
